change_notes.p3-c001: Postgres-only divergence documented in README.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/STORAGE.md
change_notes.p3-c002: Low-effort parity fixes: unimplemented!/todo! panics replaced, did:web enabled, 2MB blob limit, getBlob Content-Disposition: attachment, tools.ozone.* proxy
change_notes.p3-c003: Refresh token replay defense: migration, schema, helpers, replay check + JTI insert in rotate_refresh_token
change_notes.p3-c004: Sequencer race fix via pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(did)); recovery hardening skips corrupt event bytes
change_notes.p3-c005: DELEGATED: rsky-lexicon refresh requires network access to upstream packages — human/cursor task
change_notes.p3-c006: Sync v1.1: SyncEvt.commit field added to sequencer events + SubscribeReposSync lexicon struct
change_notes.p3-c007: Actor store RLS: permissive policies on 6 per-actor tables (non-breaking; tighten once SET LOCAL wired)
change_notes.p3-c008: Federation conformance harness in tests/conformance/ (docker-compose + shell driver + Dockerfile)
change_notes.p3-c009: OAuth endpoints wired: metadata, jwks, par, authorize, token, revoke, introspect — structured errors not panics
change_notes.p3-c010: rsky-oauth-scopes crate: OAuthScope, ScopeSet, scope_permits_xrpc, known constants — in workspace
change_notes.p3-c011: OAuth schema migration: oauth_client, oauth_device, oauth_authorized_client, oauth_token, oauth_par_request
change_notes.p3-c012: OAuth wired into describeServer: oauthIssuer field added to lexicon + populated from PDS_HOSTNAME

deployment_notes: ArgoCD removed. Unified deploy.yml (conduit pattern) replaces ArgoCD + 6 standalone build workflows.
notes: All 12 changes executed (11 implemented, 1 delegated). cargo check clean. Phase ready for live verification.
